productDisplayName: Puma Men Jiyu 2 White Casual Shoes
description: The puma Jiyu sneaker ensures you are comfortable and trendy on the go. It comes in a convenient slip-on design without the usual plain old lace-up. You can slip in and out of these uber cool sneakers which won't slip out of style any time. Upper Synthetic leather upper for long-lasting durability Slip-on design for easy use Practical hook-and-loop closure strap for optimum Fit Lightly foam-padded collar enhances comfort Unique stitching detail Arched footbed for ergonomic fit Contrast panelled logo design to the side for an element of style Textured finish with cushioned cuff for comfortable grip of the foot Cushioned collar to keep the ankle from twisting Padded tongue for comfort fit Midsole Cushioned footbed for a comfortable walk EVA lightweight midsole for superior shock absorption Textile lining and cushioned footbed for added comfort Outsole Printed rubber outsole for a funky look Multi-directional patterns in carbon rubber for superior grip of rough terrain Stress on pivot point to facilitate easy 180 degree movement of the feet without causing an injury
